attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT      FNL_QRY.CEC_ID,
         'PMM' AS DV_APPLICATION_NAME,
		 FNL_QRY.CATEGORY_CD AS DV_CATEGORY_CD,
		 FNL_QRY.DATA_TYPE_CD AS DV_DATA_TYPE_CD,
		 FNL_QRY.DATA_VAL_CD AS DV_DATA_VALUE_CD,
		 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
		 USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
		 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
		 USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER
		 FROM ( 



SELECT	 CAST(CEC_ID AS CHAR(8)) AS CEC_ID, 
CAST('PORTAL_PATH'  AS VARCHAR(50))AS CATEGORY_CD, CAST('PORTALPATH' AS VARCHAR(50)) AS DATA_TYPE_CD,
               CAST('/shared/10Welcome/_portal/Home'AS VARCHAR(100))  AS DATA_VAL_CD

FROM (
		SELECT	NIU.DD_CEC_ID AS CEC_ID,
		APP.APPLICATION_NAME AS APPLICATION_NAME,
		APPC.BK_APPLICATION_COMPONENT_NAME AS APP_COMPONENT_NAME,
		URAC.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME AS IAM_ROLE_NAME
	 FROM	
		$$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_USER NIU,
		$$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_USER_ROLE_APP_COMP_MAP URAC,
		$$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_APPLICATION APP,
		$$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_APPLICATION_COMPONENT APPC,
		$$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_ROLE IR
	WHERE	  1=1
		AND URAC.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG = 'N'
		AND NIU.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG = 'N'
		AND NIU.IAM_USER_KEY = URAC.IAM_USER_KEY
		AND URAC.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY = APP.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY
		AND URAC.IAM_APPLICATION_COMPONENT_KEY = APPC.IAM_APPLICATION_COMPONENT_KEY
		AND IR.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME = URAC.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME )C
WHERE	APPLICATION_NAME = 'Finance BI Dashboard' 
AND	(IAM_ROLE_NAME IN  ('FIN_DB_EA', 'FIN_DB_RTM',  'FIN_DB_RTM_RESTRICTED',
'FIN_DB_EA_SERVICES', 'FIN DB_PBD', 'FIN DB_BC', 'FIN DB_SD', 'FIN_DB_SC')
OR	IAM_ROLE_NAME  LIKE 'PMM%' )
GROUP BY 1

UNION ALL


SELECT	CEC_ID AS CEC_ID, 'WEBGROUP' AS CATEGORY_CD, 'WEBGROUPS' AS DATA_TYPE ,
		COALESCE( APP_COMPONENT_NAME , 'NoAccPG' ) AS DATA_VAL_CD

FROM (
		SELECT	NIU.DD_CEC_ID AS CEC_ID,
		APP.APPLICATION_NAME AS APPLICATION_NAME,
		APPC.BK_APPLICATION_COMPONENT_NAME AS APP_COMPONENT_NAME,
		URAC.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME AS IAM_ROLE_NAME
	 FROM	
		$$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_USER NIU,
		$$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_USER_ROLE_APP_COMP_MAP URAC,
		$$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_APPLICATION APP,
		$$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_APPLICATION_COMPONENT APPC,
		$$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_ROLE IR
	WHERE	  1=1
		AND URAC.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG = 'N'
		AND NIU.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG = 'N'
		AND NIU.IAM_USER_KEY = URAC.IAM_USER_KEY
		AND URAC.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY = APP.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY
		AND URAC.IAM_APPLICATION_COMPONENT_KEY = APPC.IAM_APPLICATION_COMPONENT_KEY
		AND IR.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME = URAC.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME )C
WHERE	APPLICATION_NAME = 'Finance BI Dashboard' 
AND	(IAM_ROLE_NAME IN  ('FIN_DB_EA', 'FIN_DB_RTM',  'FIN_DB_RTM_RESTRICTED',
'FIN_DB_EA_SERVICES', 'FIN DB_PBD', 'FIN DB_BC', 'FIN DB_SD', 'FIN_DB_SC')
OR	IAM_ROLE_NAME  LIKE 'PMM%' )

UNION ALL




SELECT b.CEC_ID AS CECID, 'DATA_SECURITY' AS CATEGORY_CD, 'S_SEC_SLS_HIER_ACC_L' || TRIM ( MAXIMUM ( B.IAM_LEVEL_NUM ) ) || 
'_LIST' AS DATA_TYPE_CD, B.SALES_TERR_DESCR  AS DATA_VAL_CD
FROM 
(
SEL	NIU.DD_CEC_ID AS CEC_ID ,
		SALES_TERR.DD_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR AS SALES_TERR_DESCR,
        SALES_TERR.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE AS ASSIGNMENT_TYPE,
        SALES_TERR.DD_BK_SALES_HIER_TYPE_CD AS SALES_HIER_TYPE_CD,
		APP.APPLICATION_NAME AS APPLICATION_NAME,
        SALES_TERR.IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT IAM_LEVEL_NUM		
		FROM $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_SALES_TERR_LNK SALES_TERR,
	 $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_APPLICATION APP,
	 $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_USER NIU
	WHERE 
	 SALES_TERR.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY = APP.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY 
	 
	AND	
	 NIU.IAM_USER_KEY =  SALES_TERR.IAM_USER_KEY
	 
	AND	SALES_TERR.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG            = 'N'
	 
	AND	 APPLICATION_NAME='Finance BI Dashboard' ) B
WHERE B.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE = 'Visibility' 
AND B.APPLICATION_NAME = 'Finance BI Dashboard' 
AND       SALES_HIER_TYPE_CD = 'CORP. REVENUE' 
GROUP BY B.SALES_TERR_DESCR, b.CEC_ID
UNION ALL 
SELECT    'GENERIC', 'DATA_SECURITY', 'S_SEC_SLS_HIER_ACC_L1_LIST' , 'dummy' FROM    $$COMREFVWDB.R_DUAL 
UNION   ALL 
SELECT   'GENERIC', 'DATA_SECURITY',  'S_SEC_SLS_HIER_ACC_L2_LIST' , 'dummy' FROM    $$COMREFVWDB.R_DUAL 
UNION   ALL 
SELECT 'GENERIC', 'DATA_SECURITY',  'S_SEC_SLS_HIER_ACC_L3_LIST' , 'dummy' FROM    $$COMREFVWDB.R_DUAL 
UNION   ALL 
SELECT 'GENERIC', 'DATA_SECURITY', 'S_SEC_SLS_HIER_ACC_L4_LIST' , 'dummy' FROM    $$COMREFVWDB.R_DUAL 
UNION   ALL 
SELECT  'GENERIC', 'DATA_SECURITY',  'S_SEC_SLS_HIER_ACC_L5_LIST' , 'dummy' FROM    $$COMREFVWDB.R_DUAL 
UNION   ALL 
SELECT 'GENERIC', 'DATA_SECURITY','S_SEC_SLS_HIER_ACC_L6_LIST' , 'dummy' FROM    $$COMREFVWDB.R_DUAL 

UNION   ALL 



SELECT b.CEC_ID AS CEC_ID, 'DATA_SECURITY' AS CATEGORY_CD, 'S_SEC_PRODUCT_HIER_ACC_L' || TRIM ( MINIMUM ( B.IAM_LEVEL_NUM ) ) || 
'_LIST'  AS DATA_TYPE_CD, B.IAM_PRODUCT_HIER_KEY  AS DATA_VAL_CD

FROM	(
SELECT	
		HIER.PRODUCT_HIER_KEY IAM_PRODUCT_HIER_KEY,
		HIER.IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT AS IAM_LEVEL_NUM ,
		NIU.DD_CEC_ID  AS CEC_ID,
		HIER.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE  AS ASSIGNMENT_TYPE,
	   APP.APPLICATION_NAME AS APPLICATION_NAME 
	FROM
		(
			SELECT
				BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME
				,PF.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY
				,BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID  AS PRODUCT_HIER_KEY
				,ASSIGNMENT_TYPE
				,STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG
				,EXCLUSIVE_OR_RESTRICTIVE_FLG
				,IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT
				,IAM_USER_KEY
			FROM
				$$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_PRODUCT_FAMILY_LINK PF
			WHERE  PF.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'

			UNION ALL
			SELECT
				BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME
				,BU.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY
				,BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID AS PRODUCT_HIER_KEY
				,ASSIGNMENT_TYPE
				,STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG
				,EXCLUSIVE_OR_RESTRICTIVE_FLG
				,IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT
				,IAM_USER_KEY
			FROM
				$$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_BUSINESS_UNIT_LINK  BU
			WHERE  BU.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'

			UNION ALL
			SELECT
				BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME
				,TG.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY
				,BK_TECHNOLOGY_GROUP_ID AS PRODUCT_HIER_KEY
				,ASSIGNMENT_TYPE
				,STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG
				,EXCLUSIVE_OR_RESTRICTIVE_FLG
				,IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT
				,IAM_USER_KEY
			FROM
				$$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_TECHNOLOGY_GROUP_LINK TG
			WHERE TG.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'

			UNION ALL
			SELECT
				BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME
				,TC.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY
				,BK_PRODUCT_HIER_COMPANY_ID AS PRODUCT_HIER_KEY
				,ASSIGNMENT_TYPE
				,STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG
				,EXCLUSIVE_OR_RESTRICTIVE_FLG
				,IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT
				,IAM_USER_KEY
			FROM
				$$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_PRODUCT_TOTAL_CISCO_LINK  TC
			WHERE TC.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'
		) HIER,
		$$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_APPLICATION APP,
		$$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_USER NIU
	WHERE
		HIER.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY = APP.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY
		AND NIU.IAM_USER_KEY =  HIER.IAM_USER_KEY
		AND NIU.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG = 'N'
		
		) B
WHERE B.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE = 'Visibility' 
AND B.APPLICATION_NAME = 'Finance BI Dashboard' 
GROUP BY B.IAM_PRODUCT_HIER_KEY, b.CEC_ID
UNION   ALL 
SELECT 'GENERIC', 'DATA_SECURITY', 'S_SEC_PRODUCT_HIER_ACC_L1_LIST' , 'dummy' FROM    $$COMREFVWDB.R_DUAL 
UNION   ALL 
SELECT 'GENERIC', 'DATA_SECURITY', 'S_SEC_PRODUCT_HIER_ACC_L2_LIST' , 'dummy' FROM    $$COMREFVWDB.R_DUAL

UNION ALL



SELECT  b.CEC_ID AS CEC_ID, 'DATA_SECURITY' AS CATEGORY_CD,     'S_SEC_BE_HIER_ACC_L' || TRIM( MAX(B.IAM_LEVEL_NUM)) ||'_LIST' AS 
DATA_TYPE_CD,  B.BUSINESS_ENTITY_HIER_NAME AS DATA_VAL_CD

FROM
(SELECT  
	   HIER.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD  AS ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD 
      ,HIER.BUSINESS_ENTITY_HIER_TYPE_CD
      ,HIER.BUSINESS_ENTITY_HIER_NAME AS BUSINESS_ENTITY_HIER_NAME	  
	  ,HIER.IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT  AS IAM_LEVEL_NUM           
	  ,NIU.DD_CEC_ID AS CEC_ID
	  ,APP.APPLICATION_NAME AS APPLICATION_NAME
	
	FROM
	
	(SELECT 
	   BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME              
	  ,BE.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY           
	  ,BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME  AS BUSINESS_ENTITY_HIER_NAME
	  ,BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_TYPE_CD  AS BUSINESS_ENTITY_HIER_TYPE_CD      
	  ,ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD               
	  ,STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG     
	  ,EXCLUSIVE_OR_RESTRICTIVE_FLG  
	  ,IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT             
	  ,IAM_USER_KEY
	FROM
	$$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_BUSINESS_ENTITY_LINK BE
	WHERE  BE.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'
	UNION ALL
	SELECT
	  BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME
	  ,SBE.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY
	  ,BK_SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME  AS BUSINESS_ENTITY_HIER_NAME
	  ,BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_TYPE_CD  AS BUSINESS_ENTITY_HIER_TYPE_CD  
	  ,ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD            
	  ,STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG
	  ,EXCLUSIVE_OR_RESTRICTIVE_FLG
	  ,IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT
	  ,IAM_USER_KEY
	  FROM
	$$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_LINK  SBE
	WHERE  SBE.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'
	) 
	 HIER,
	  $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_APPLICATION APP,
	  $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_USER NIU
	WHERE
	          HIER.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY = APP.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY
	AND NIU.IAM_USER_KEY =  HIER.IAM_USER_KEY
	AND NIU.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG = 'N'
    AND APPLICATION_NAME = 'Finance BI Dashboard'
	AND BUSINESS_ENTITY_HIER_TYPE_CD='I') B
	WHERE  B.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD = 'Visibility' 
AND B.APPLICATION_NAME = 'Finance BI Dashboard' 
GROUP BY  B.BUSINESS_ENTITY_HIER_NAME, b.CEC_ID
UNION ALL
SELECT  'GENERIC', 'DATA_SECURITY', 'S_SEC_BE_HIER_ACC_L1_LIST', 'dummy' FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_DUAL
UNION ALL
SELECT  'GENERIC', 'DATA_SECURITY', 'S_SEC_BE_HIER_ACC_L2_LIST', 'dummy' FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_DUAL



UNION ALL 
SELECT  CEC_ID AS CEC_ID, 'RPD_GROUP' AS CATEGORY_CD, 'GROUP' AS DATA_TYPE_CD, 'SH_L' || TRIM(MIN(B.IAM_LEVEL_NUM)) AS DATA_VAL_CD FROM 

(
SEL	NIU.DD_CEC_ID AS CEC_ID ,
		SALES_TERR.DD_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR AS SALES_TERR_DESCR,
        SALES_TERR.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE AS ASSIGNMENT_TYPE,
        SALES_TERR.DD_BK_SALES_HIER_TYPE_CD AS SALES_HIER_TYPE_CD,
		APP.APPLICATION_NAME AS APPLICATION_NAME,
        SALES_TERR.IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT IAM_LEVEL_NUM		
		FROM $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_SALES_TERR_LNK SALES_TERR,
	 $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_APPLICATION APP,
	 $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_USER NIU
	WHERE 
	 SALES_TERR.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY = APP.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY 
	 
	AND	
	 NIU.IAM_USER_KEY =  SALES_TERR.IAM_USER_KEY
	 
	AND	SALES_TERR.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG            = 'N'
	 
	AND	 APPLICATION_NAME='Finance BI Dashboard' ) B
WHERE B.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE = 
'Visibility'  
AND B.SALES_HIER_TYPE_CD= 'CORP. REVENUE' AND B.APPLICATION_NAME =  'Finance BI Dashboard' 
GROUP BY CEC_ID,B.IAM_LEVEL_NUM 

UNION ALL

SELECT 'GENERIC' AS CEC_ID, 'RPD_GROUP' AS CATEGORY_CD, 'GROUP' AS DATA_TYPE_CD, 'PBD_DATA_ACC_GRP' AS DATA_VAL_CD FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_DUAL 
GROUP BY 1,2

UNION ALL

SELECT CEC_ID AS CEC_ID, 'RPD_GROUP' AS CATEGORY_CD, 'GROUP' AS DATA_TYPE_CD, 'BE_L' || TRIM( MIN(B.IAM_LEVEL_NUM)) AS DATA_VAL_CD 

FROM (
SELECT  
	   HIER.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD  AS ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD 
      ,HIER.BUSINESS_ENTITY_HIER_TYPE_CD        		  
	  ,HIER.IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT  AS IAM_LEVEL_NUM           
	  ,NIU.DD_CEC_ID AS CEC_ID
	  ,APP.APPLICATION_NAME AS APPLICATION_NAME
	
	FROM
	
	(SELECT 
	   BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME              
	  ,BE.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY           
	  ,BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME  AS BUSINESS_ENTITY_HIER_NAME
	  ,BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_TYPE_CD  AS BUSINESS_ENTITY_HIER_TYPE_CD      
	  ,ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD               
	  ,STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG     
	  ,EXCLUSIVE_OR_RESTRICTIVE_FLG  
	  ,IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT             
	  ,IAM_USER_KEY
	FROM
	$$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_BUSINESS_ENTITY_LINK BE
	WHERE  BE.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'
	UNION ALL
	SELECT
	  BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME
	  ,SBE.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY
	  ,BK_SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME  AS BUSINESS_ENTITY_HIER_NAME
	  ,BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_TYPE_CD  AS BUSINESS_ENTITY_HIER_TYPE_CD  
	  ,ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD            
	  ,STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG
	  ,EXCLUSIVE_OR_RESTRICTIVE_FLG
	  ,IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT
	  ,IAM_USER_KEY
	  FROM
	$$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_LINK  SBE
	WHERE  SBE.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'
	) 
	 HIER,
	  $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_APPLICATION APP,
	  $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_USER NIU
	WHERE
	          HIER.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY = APP.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY
	AND NIU.IAM_USER_KEY =  HIER.IAM_USER_KEY
	AND NIU.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG = 'N'
 AND  APPLICATION_NAME = 'Finance BI Dashboard'
	AND BUSINESS_ENTITY_HIER_TYPE_CD='I' ) B
WHERE  B.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD = 'Visibility' 
AND B.APPLICATION_NAME = 'Finance BI Dashboard' 
GROUP BY CEC_ID,B.IAM_LEVEL_NUM 

UNION ALL
SELECT CEC_ID AS CEC_ID, 'RPD_GROUP' AS CATEGORY_CD, 'GROUP' AS DATA_TYPE_CD,  'PH_L'||TRIM( MIN(B.IAM_LEVEL_NUM)) AS DATA_VAL_CD  

FROM	(
SELECT	
		HIER.PRODUCT_HIER_KEY IAM_PRODUCT_HIER_KEY,
		HIER.IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT AS IAM_LEVEL_NUM ,
		NIU.DD_CEC_ID  AS CEC_ID,
		HIER.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE  AS ASSIGNMENT_TYPE,
	   APP.APPLICATION_NAME AS APPLICATION_NAME 
	FROM
		(
			SELECT
				BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME
				,PF.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY
				,BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID  AS PRODUCT_HIER_KEY
				,ASSIGNMENT_TYPE
				,STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG
				,EXCLUSIVE_OR_RESTRICTIVE_FLG
				,IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT
				,IAM_USER_KEY
			FROM
				$$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_PRODUCT_FAMILY_LINK PF
			WHERE  PF.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'

			UNION ALL
			SELECT
				BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME
				,BU.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY
				,BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID AS PRODUCT_HIER_KEY
				,ASSIGNMENT_TYPE
				,STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG
				,EXCLUSIVE_OR_RESTRICTIVE_FLG
				,IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT
				,IAM_USER_KEY
			FROM
				$$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_BUSINESS_UNIT_LINK  BU
			WHERE  BU.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'

			UNION ALL
			SELECT
				BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME
				,TG.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY
				,BK_TECHNOLOGY_GROUP_ID AS PRODUCT_HIER_KEY
				,ASSIGNMENT_TYPE
				,STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG
				,EXCLUSIVE_OR_RESTRICTIVE_FLG
				,IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT
				,IAM_USER_KEY
			FROM
				$$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_TECHNOLOGY_GROUP_LINK TG
			WHERE TG.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'

			UNION ALL
			SELECT
				BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME
				,TC.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY
				,BK_PRODUCT_HIER_COMPANY_ID AS PRODUCT_HIER_KEY
				,ASSIGNMENT_TYPE
				,STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG
				,EXCLUSIVE_OR_RESTRICTIVE_FLG
				,IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT
				,IAM_USER_KEY
			FROM
				$$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_PRODUCT_TOTAL_CISCO_LINK  TC
			WHERE TC.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'
		) HIER,
		$$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_APPLICATION APP,
		$$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_USER NIU
	WHERE
		HIER.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY = APP.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY
		AND NIU.IAM_USER_KEY =  HIER.IAM_USER_KEY
		AND NIU.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG = 'N'
		
		) B

WHERE B.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE = 'Visibility' 
AND B.APPLICATION_NAME = 'Finance BI Dashboard'   
GROUP BY CEC_ID,B.IAM_LEVEL_NUM 

UNION ALL

SELECT CEC_ID AS CEC_ID, 'RPD_GROUP' AS CATEGORY_CD, 'GROUP' AS DATA_TYPE_CD, 'BE_L' || TRIM(B.IAM_LEVEL_NUM)|| '_'||CASE WHEN COUNT(1) >1 THEN 'MULTI_VAL' ELSE 'SINGLE_VAL'  END AS DATA_VAL_CD

FROM (SELECT  
	   HIER.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD  AS ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD 
      ,HIER.BUSINESS_ENTITY_HIER_TYPE_CD        		  
	  ,HIER.IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT  AS IAM_LEVEL_NUM           
	  ,NIU.DD_CEC_ID AS CEC_ID
	  ,APP.APPLICATION_NAME AS APPLICATION_NAME
	
	FROM
	
	(SELECT 
	   BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME              
	  ,BE.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY           
	  ,BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME  AS BUSINESS_ENTITY_HIER_NAME
	  ,BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_TYPE_CD  AS BUSINESS_ENTITY_HIER_TYPE_CD      
	  ,ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD               
	  ,STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG     
	  ,EXCLUSIVE_OR_RESTRICTIVE_FLG  
	  ,IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT             
	  ,IAM_USER_KEY
	FROM
	$$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_BUSINESS_ENTITY_LINK BE
	WHERE  BE.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'
	UNION ALL
	SELECT
	  BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME
	  ,SBE.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY
	  ,BK_SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME  AS BUSINESS_ENTITY_HIER_NAME
	  ,BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_TYPE_CD  AS BUSINESS_ENTITY_HIER_TYPE_CD  
	  ,ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD            
	  ,STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG
	  ,EXCLUSIVE_OR_RESTRICTIVE_FLG
	  ,IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT
	  ,IAM_USER_KEY
	  FROM
	$$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_LINK  SBE
	WHERE  SBE.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'
	) 
	 HIER,
	  $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_APPLICATION APP,
	  $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_USER NIU
	WHERE
	          HIER.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY = APP.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY
	AND NIU.IAM_USER_KEY =  HIER.IAM_USER_KEY
	AND NIU.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG = 'N'
 AND  APPLICATION_NAME = 'Finance BI Dashboard'
	AND BUSINESS_ENTITY_HIER_TYPE_CD='I') B
WHERE  B.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD = 'Visibility' 
AND B.APPLICATION_NAME = 'Finance BI Dashboard' 
GROUP BY CEC_ID, B.IAM_LEVEL_NUM

UNION ALL

SELECT  B.CEC_ID, 'HIER_VALUE' AS CATEGORY_CD,  'S_SEC_BE_HIER_'|| TRIM(IAM_LEVEL_NUM)||'_VALUE'   AS DATA_TYPE_CD, CASE WHEN IAM_LEVEL_NUM=0 THEN 'TOTAL ENGINEERING' ELSE UPPER(MIN(B.BUSINESS_ENTITY_HIER_NAME)) END

FROM
(SELECT  
	   HIER.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD  AS ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD 
      ,HIER.BUSINESS_ENTITY_HIER_TYPE_CD
      ,HIER.BUSINESS_ENTITY_HIER_NAME AS BUSINESS_ENTITY_HIER_NAME	  
	  ,HIER.IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT  AS IAM_LEVEL_NUM           
	  ,NIU.DD_CEC_ID AS CEC_ID
	  ,APP.APPLICATION_NAME AS APPLICATION_NAME
	
	FROM
	
	(SELECT 
	   BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME              
	  ,BE.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY           
	  ,BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME  AS BUSINESS_ENTITY_HIER_NAME
	  ,BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_TYPE_CD  AS BUSINESS_ENTITY_HIER_TYPE_CD      
	  ,ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD               
	  ,STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG     
	  ,EXCLUSIVE_OR_RESTRICTIVE_FLG  
	  ,IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT             
	  ,IAM_USER_KEY
	FROM
	$$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_BUSINESS_ENTITY_LINK BE
	WHERE  BE.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'
	UNION ALL
	SELECT
	  BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME
	  ,SBE.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY
	  ,BK_SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME  AS BUSINESS_ENTITY_HIER_NAME
	  ,BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_TYPE_CD  AS BUSINESS_ENTITY_HIER_TYPE_CD  
	  ,ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD            
	  ,STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG
	  ,EXCLUSIVE_OR_RESTRICTIVE_FLG
	  ,IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT
	  ,IAM_USER_KEY
	  FROM
	$$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_LINK  SBE
	WHERE  SBE.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'
	) 
	 HIER,
	  $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_APPLICATION APP,
	  $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_USER NIU
	WHERE
	          HIER.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY = APP.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY
	AND NIU.IAM_USER_KEY =  HIER.IAM_USER_KEY
	AND NIU.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG = 'N'
 AND  APPLICATION_NAME = 'Finance BI Dashboard'
	AND BUSINESS_ENTITY_HIER_TYPE_CD='I' ) B
WHERE B.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD = 'Visibility' 
AND B.APPLICATION_NAME = 'Finance BI Dashboard'
GROUP BY CEC_ID,B.IAM_LEVEL_NUM

UNION ALL

SELECT CEC_ID AS CEC_ID, 'DATA_NODE_CNT'  AS CATEGORY_CD,  'BE_L' || TRIM(B.IAM_LEVEL_NUM)|| '_'||'NODE_CNT' AS DATA_TYPE_CD,TRIM(COUNT(1)) AS DATA_VAL_CD

FROM (SELECT  
	   HIER.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD  AS ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD 
      ,HIER.BUSINESS_ENTITY_HIER_TYPE_CD        		  
	  ,HIER.IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT  AS IAM_LEVEL_NUM           
	  ,NIU.DD_CEC_ID AS CEC_ID
	  ,APP.APPLICATION_NAME AS APPLICATION_NAME
	
	FROM
	
	(SELECT 
	   BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME              
	  ,BE.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY           
	  ,BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME  AS BUSINESS_ENTITY_HIER_NAME
	  ,BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_TYPE_CD  AS BUSINESS_ENTITY_HIER_TYPE_CD      
	  ,ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD               
	  ,STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG     
	  ,EXCLUSIVE_OR_RESTRICTIVE_FLG  
	  ,IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT             
	  ,IAM_USER_KEY
	FROM
	$$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_BUSINESS_ENTITY_LINK BE
	WHERE  BE.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'
	UNION ALL
	SELECT
	  BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME
	  ,SBE.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY
	  ,BK_SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME  AS BUSINESS_ENTITY_HIER_NAME
	  ,BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_TYPE_CD  AS BUSINESS_ENTITY_HIER_TYPE_CD  
	  ,ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD            
	  ,STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG
	  ,EXCLUSIVE_OR_RESTRICTIVE_FLG
	  ,IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT
	  ,IAM_USER_KEY
	  FROM
	$$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_LINK  SBE
	WHERE  SBE.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'
	) 
	 HIER,
	  $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_APPLICATION APP,
	  $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_USER NIU
	WHERE
	          HIER.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY = APP.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY
	AND NIU.IAM_USER_KEY =  HIER.IAM_USER_KEY
	AND NIU.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG = 'N'
 AND  APPLICATION_NAME = 'Finance BI Dashboard'
	AND BUSINESS_ENTITY_HIER_TYPE_CD='I') B
WHERE  B.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD = 'Visibility' 
AND B.APPLICATION_NAME = 'Finance BI Dashboard' 
GROUP BY CEC_ID, B.IAM_LEVEL_NUM
HAVING COUNT(1)>1
UNION ALL

SELECT CEC_ID AS CEC_ID, 'DATA_NODE_CNT'  AS CATEGORY_CD,  'PROD_L' || TRIM(B.IAM_LEVEL_NUM)|| '_'||'NODE_CNT' AS DATA_TYPE_CD,TRIM(COUNT(1)) AS DATA_VAL_CD
FROM	(
SELECT	
		HIER.PRODUCT_HIER_KEY IAM_PRODUCT_HIER_KEY,
		HIER.IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT AS IAM_LEVEL_NUM ,
		NIU.DD_CEC_ID  AS CEC_ID,
		HIER.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE  AS ASSIGNMENT_TYPE,
	   APP.APPLICATION_NAME AS APPLICATION_NAME 
	FROM
		(
			SELECT
				BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME
				,PF.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY
				,BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID  AS PRODUCT_HIER_KEY
				,ASSIGNMENT_TYPE
				,STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG
				,EXCLUSIVE_OR_RESTRICTIVE_FLG
				,IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT
				,IAM_USER_KEY
			FROM
				$$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_PRODUCT_FAMILY_LINK PF
			WHERE  PF.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'

			UNION ALL
			SELECT
				BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME
				,BU.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY
				,BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID AS PRODUCT_HIER_KEY
				,ASSIGNMENT_TYPE
				,STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG
				,EXCLUSIVE_OR_RESTRICTIVE_FLG
				,IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT
				,IAM_USER_KEY
			FROM
				$$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_BUSINESS_UNIT_LINK  BU
			WHERE  BU.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'

			UNION ALL
			SELECT
				BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME
				,TG.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY
				,BK_TECHNOLOGY_GROUP_ID AS PRODUCT_HIER_KEY
				,ASSIGNMENT_TYPE
				,STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG
				,EXCLUSIVE_OR_RESTRICTIVE_FLG
				,IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT
				,IAM_USER_KEY
			FROM
				$$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_TECHNOLOGY_GROUP_LINK TG
			WHERE TG.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'

			UNION ALL
			SELECT
				BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME
				,TC.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY
				,BK_PRODUCT_HIER_COMPANY_ID AS PRODUCT_HIER_KEY
				,ASSIGNMENT_TYPE
				,STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG
				,EXCLUSIVE_OR_RESTRICTIVE_FLG
				,IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT
				,IAM_USER_KEY
			FROM
				$$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_PRODUCT_TOTAL_CISCO_LINK  TC
			WHERE TC.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'
		) HIER,
		$$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_APPLICATION APP,
		$$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_USER NIU
	WHERE
		HIER.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY = APP.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY
		AND NIU.IAM_USER_KEY =  HIER.IAM_USER_KEY
		AND NIU.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG = 'N'
		
		) B  
WHERE  B.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE = 'Visibility' 
AND B.APPLICATION_NAME = 'Finance BI Dashboard' 
GROUP BY CEC_ID, B.IAM_LEVEL_NUM
HAVING COUNT(1)>1
UNION ALL

SELECT CEC_ID AS CEC_ID, 'DATA_NODE_CNT'  AS CATEGORY_CD,  'SALES_L' || TRIM(B.IAM_LEVEL_NUM)|| '_'||'NODE_CNT' AS DATA_TYPE_CD,TRIM(COUNT(1)) AS DATA_VAL_CD
FROM    

(
SEL	NIU.DD_CEC_ID AS CEC_ID ,
		SALES_TERR.DD_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR AS SALES_TERR_DESCR,
        SALES_TERR.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE AS ASSIGNMENT_TYPE,
        SALES_TERR.DD_BK_SALES_HIER_TYPE_CD AS SALES_HIER_TYPE_CD,
		APP.APPLICATION_NAME AS APPLICATION_NAME,
        SALES_TERR.IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT IAM_LEVEL_NUM		
		FROM $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_SALES_TERR_LNK SALES_TERR,
	 $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_APPLICATION APP,
	 $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_USER NIU
	WHERE 
	 SALES_TERR.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY = APP.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY 
	 
	AND	
	 NIU.IAM_USER_KEY =  SALES_TERR.IAM_USER_KEY
	 
	AND	SALES_TERR.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG            = 'N'
	 
	AND	 APPLICATION_NAME='Finance BI Dashboard' ) B
WHERE  B.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE = 'Visibility' 
AND B.APPLICATION_NAME = 'Finance BI Dashboard' 
GROUP BY CEC_ID, B.IAM_LEVEL_NUM
HAVING COUNT(1)>1

) FNL_QRY
WHERE CEC_ID IS NOT NULL
